- Do NOT output a snippet only.
- Must not start with just "script:".
- Must start with "language".
- Needs to be complete migrated Travis CI configuration YAML output.
- Your output MUST include: language and script.
- Use Travis lifecycle keys (before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy) as needed.

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map jobs/steps -> Travis lifecycle; strategy.matrix -> language versions or matrix.include; continue-on-error -> matrix.allow_failures.
- Env: ${{ secrets.FOO }} -> $FOO (assume configured).
- Caches: actions/cache -> cache: directories (e.g., ~/.m2/repository, ~/.gradle/*, $HOME/.npm).
- Services: GHA services -> Travis services/addons; keep docker-compose and wait loops in hooks.
- Triggers: on: branches/tags -> branches: only/except; releases -> deploy.on.tags: true.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source. If no 1 to 1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:".
- Maintain 1 to 1, JDK, Git version numbers, branch names as in source. Do not introduce new names or brances or numbers.
- DO NOT repeat to sequence JDK or git version numbers, use as given in the Github Actions and stick to it.
- DO NOT repeat sections, like deploy, script, before_install, install, matrix etc. MUST NOT be duplicated.

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '11']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Make mvnw executable
        run: chmod +x mvnw
      - name: Check Maven version
        run: mvn -version
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn -B -U -Possrh clean verify
output:
language: java

services:
  - docker

jdk:
  - openjdk8
  - openjdk11

before_install:
  - chmod +x mvnw

install: true

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

script:
  - mvn -version
  - mvn -B -U -Possrh clean verify

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ develop ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Before install
      run: git clone -b travis "$(git config --get remote.origin.url)" target/travis

    - name: Verify (PR)

    - name: Deploy (push)

      run: mvn clean deploy --settings target/travis/settings.xml

input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

    - name: Build
      run: ./gradlew clean build javadoc --no-daemon

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/journal-*/file-access.bin
        rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
        rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/scripts/
        rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock
        sync

    - name: Deploy
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      run: bash -v scripts/publishToBintray.sh
output:
language: java

dist: trusty

jdk: oraclejdk8

env:
  global:
    # these secure values are encrypted for linkedin/avro-util. for use in forked repos, set env vars in your own build - they should win over these (as these wont be decodable in forked builds)
    - secure: ""
    - secure: ""

addons:
  apt:
    packages:
      - oracle-java8-installer

install: true

script:
  - ./gradlew clean build javadoc --no-daemon

before_cache:
  - rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/journal-*/file-access.bin
  - rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
  - rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/scripts/
  - rm -rvf $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock
  - sync

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

deploy:
  provider: script
  script: bash -v scripts/publishToBintray.sh
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    all_branches: true
    tags: true
    # the condition on the tag name (should be a semantic version) is inside the script, for ease of development

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  DATE_VERSION: ${{ github.run_number }}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 13
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '13'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.m2
            frontend/node
            frontend/node_modules
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}-node-${{ hashFiles('frontend/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Install Chromium
        run: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y chromium-browser
      - name: Setup Firefox
        uses: browser-actions/setup-firefox@v1
        with:
          firefox-version: '63.0'
      - name: Decrypt SSH key
        run: |
          openssl aes-256-cbc -K ${{ secrets.ENCRYPTED_7051AC01CF89_KEY }} -iv ${{ secrets.ENCRYPTED_7051AC01CF89_IV }} -in ./.travis/id_rsa.enc -out ~/.ssh/id_rsa -d
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
      - name: Check Java version
        run: |
          java -version
          echo $JAVA_HOME
      - name: Start Docker Compose services
        run: (cd docker; docker-compose up -d)
      - name: Set version
        run: echo "DATE_VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d.%H.%M)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Remove Maven settings
        run: rm ~/.m2/settings.xml || true
      - name: Build and test
        run: ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -P frontend -P jacoco -P docker -P webdriver-chrome -P webdriver-firefox -Dcustom.selenium.headless=true clean install
      - name: Stop Docker Compose services
        run: (cd docker; docker-compose down)
      - name: Run deploy tests
        run: ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -pl deploy-test -P deploy-test clean test
      - name: Cleanup
        run: |
          rm -rf ~/.m2/repository/com/github/nkonev/blog
          rm -rf $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/frontend/node_modules/.cache
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Push Docker image and deploy
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && success() && github.event_name != 'schedule'
        run: |
          echo "Will push docker image"
          echo "${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}" | docker login -u "${{ secrets.DOCKER_LOGIN }}" --password-stdin
          docker push nkonev/blog:latest
          ssh -o "BatchMode yes" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -q ${{ secrets.CONNECT_LINE }} ${{ secrets.UPDATE_COMMAND }}
output:
sudo: required
dist: xenial
language: java
cache:
  directories:
  - "$HOME/.m2"
  - frontend/node
  - frontend/node_modules
jdk: openjdk13
services:
  - docker
before_install:
  - sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y chromium-browser
  - openssl aes-256-cbc -K $encrypted_7051ac01cf89_key -iv $encrypted_7051ac01cf89_iv -in ./.travis/id_rsa.enc -out ~/.ssh/id_rsa -d
  - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
  - java -version;
    echo $JAVA_HOME;
install: "/bin/true" # workaround https://github.com/Swagger2Markup/swagger2markup-maven-plugin/pull/24
before_script:
after_acript:
script:
  - (cd docker; docker-compose up -d)
  # if there isn't pointed explicitly Chrome will be used by default for both webdriver integration test and js unit test
  # We use 'install' phase because of use jars in subsequent tests
  - DATE_VERSION=`date +%Y%m%d.%H.%M`
  - "rm ~/.m2/settings.xml"
  - ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -P frontend -P jacoco -P docker -P webdriver-chrome -P webdriver-firefox -Dcustom.selenium.headless=true clean install
  - (cd docker; docker-compose down)
  - ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -pl deploy-test -P deploy-test clean test
  - rm -rf ~/.m2/repository/com/github/nkonev/blog
  - rm -rf $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/frontend/node_modules/.cache
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
  - if [[ "$TRAVIS_BRANCH" == "master" && "$TRAVIS_TEST_RESULT" == "0" && "$TRAVIS_EVENT_TYPE" != "cron" ]]; then (
      echo "Will push docker image";
      docker login -u="$DOCKER_LOGIN" -p="$DOCKER_PASSWORD";
      docker push nkonev/blog:latest;
      ssh -o "BatchMode yes" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -q $CONNECT_LINE $UPDATE_COMMAND;
    ) else (
      echo "Won't push docker image and deploy";
    ) fi
addons:
  firefox: "63.0"

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
      - name: Install codecov
        run: pip install codecov
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Accept Android SDK licenses
        run: |

            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-maven-
      - name: Run tests and generate coverage
        run: ./gradlew clean testDebugUnitTest jacocoTestReport
      - name: Upload coverage to Coveralls
        run: ./gradlew coveralls
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: codecov

jdk:

    - mkdir "$ANDROID_HOME/licenses" || true
    - echo "24333f8a63b6825ea9c5514f83c2829b004d1fee" >> "$ANDROID_HOME/licenses/android-sdk-license"

script:
  - ./gradlew clean testDebugUnitTest jacocoTestReport

after_success:
  - ./gradlew coveralls
  - codecov

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle
    - $HOME/.m2/repository

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME }}
  OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD }}
  GPG_KEY_NAME: ${{ secrets.GPG_KEY_NAME }}
  GPG_PASSPHRASE: ${{ secrets.GPG_PASSPHRASE }}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn verify
      - name: Generate and upload coverage
        run: mvn clean test jacoco:report coveralls:report
      - name: Prepare release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        run: |
          release/createReleaseProperties.sh
          echo ${{ secrets.GPG_SECRET_KEYS }} | base64 --decode | gpg --import
          echo ${{ secrets.GPG_OWNERTRUST }} | base64 --decode | gpg --import-ownertrust
          gpg -v --keyserver hkp://p80.pool.sks-keyservers.net:80 --refresh-keys
          gpg -v --list-keys
      - name: Deploy release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        run: mvn -X release:perform --settings release/mvnsettings.xml -Darguments="-DskipTests"

env:
  global:
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME"
    - # ^^ OSSRH_JIRA_USERNAME
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD"
    - # ^^ OSSRH_JIRA_PASSWORD
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted GPG_KEY_NAME"
    - # ^^ GPG_KEY_NAME
    - secure: "the base64 string from when you encrypted GPG_PASSPHRASE"
    - # ^^ GPG_PASSPHRASE

jdk:
  - openjdk8
  
script:
  - mvn verify

after_success:
  - mvn clean test jacoco:report coveralls:report

before_deploy:
  - release/createReleaseProperties.sh
  - echo $GPG_SECRET_KEYS | base64 --decode | gpg --import
  - echo $GPG_OWNERTRUST | base64 --decode | gpg --import-ownertrust
  - gpg -v --keyserver hkp://p80.pool.sks-keyservers.net:80 --refresh-keys
  - gpg -v --list-keys

deploy:
  provider: script
  script: mvn -X release:perform --settings release/mvnsettings.xml -Darguments="-DskipTests"
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    tags: true

input:
name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master, 'release*' ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master, 'release*' ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: [ '8', '11' ]
        root_pom: [ 'pom.xml', 'android/pom.xml' ]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}

    - name: Cache Maven repository
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ matrix.java }}-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-

    - name: Install
      run: mvn -B -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=warn install -U -DskipTests=true -f ${{ matrix.root_pom }}

    - name: Verify
      run: mvn -B -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=warn verify -U -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -f ${{ matrix.root_pom }}

    - name: After success
      if: success()
      run: |
        util/deploy_snapshot.sh
        util/update_snapshot_docs.sh

    - name: After failure
      if: failure()
      run: util/print_surefire_reports.sh

- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source. If no 1 to 1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:".
- Maintain 1 to 1, JDK, Git version numbers, branch names as in source. Do not introduce new names or brances or numbers.
- DO NOT repeat to sequence JDK or git version numbers, use as given in the Github Actions and stick to it.
- DO NOT repeat sections, like deploy, script, before_install, install, matrix etc. MUST NOT be duplicated.
- DO NOT repeat the child properties as well in a section like inside matrix and others.

Now migrate below input section Github Actions workflow to equivalent complete Travis CI configuration and return ONLY the complete .travis.yml maintaining the above OUTPUT and CONVERSION rules.
input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache Maven and Sonar
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.m2/repository
          ~/.sonar/cache
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-sonar-

    - name: Build and Sonar on push
      if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
      run: mvn clean verify sonar:sonar -Pcoverage

    - name: Build on pull request
      if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
      run: mvn clean install
output:
language: java
dist: trusty
sudo: false
install: true

git:
  depth: false

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

script:
  - 'if [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" = "false" ]; then mvn clean verify sonar:sonar -Pcoverage; fi'
  - 'if [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" != "false" ]; then mvn clean install; fi'

cache:
  directories:
    - '$HOME/.m2/repository'
    - '$HOME/.sonar/cache'

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "utarwyn-github"
